summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Astra Clínica website. All major functionality working correctly including navigation, hero gallery, services display, form validation, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> in service dropdown

passed_tests: Navigation links route correctly to all 4 pages (/, /servicios, /reservaciones, /nosotros)
Hero gallery crossfade works with 3 images and auto-advance every 5 seconds
Hero slide indicators are clickable and functional
All 8 services displayed on /servicios page with correct prices ($600, $900, $500, $900, $1300, $300, $600, $300)
Reservaciones form validation shows error messages for required fields
Reservaciones form submission shows success message and redirects to WhatsApp
Nosotros page displays team section with 3 members and values section
WhatsApp floating button visible on all pages and links correctly
Footer displays all 3 columns (brand, navigation, contact) with social links
Mobile hamburger menu opens, closes, and navigation works
Astra logo loads correctly in navigation
Service 'Reservar' links on /servicios open WhatsApp with pre-filled messages
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (13/14 features working perfectly, 1 minor hydration warning)
